title: ochna latisepala
intro: Ochna latisepala, also known as the small-fruited Mussaenda or small-fruited Ochna, is a plant species in the family Ochnaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ochna latisepala are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain and inflammation, and support digestive health. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions.
